metaBuilds.synergy: Adele frontlines with Iron Rose and Queen's Garden, so armor comes first — Dawnstar's damage-cutting strikes, Xenia's ally shields, then Raiment's regeneration keep her standing inside her Thornbush.

items.Dawnstar: first — her melee hits stack a damage cut while true damage trades on
items.Xenia: second — per-target ally shields protect the carry she peels for
items.Raiment of Renewal: caps the core — missing-health regeneration keeps her holding the Thornbush

metaBuilds.holes: All defense, no power — Adele's low base damage means she zones fights but cannot end them herself.

metaBuilds.synergy: A skirmish spin: Dynamo amplifies targets her Root and Mesmerize lock down, Gaia Greaves converts her constant movement into bonus hits, and Vanguardian rounds out both armors.

items.Dynamo: first — enemies she Roots or Mesmerizes take 10% more team damage
items.Gaia Greaves: movement stacks pay bonus damage on her true-damage swings
items.Vanguardian: cheap armors and tenacity so she keeps casting through stuns

metaBuilds.holes: About 202 damage over a 10s rotation is tiny — this core still needs teammates to do every kill.

metaBuilds.synergy: Same Dawnstar-Xenia frontline opening, but Tainted Guard turns her body into anti-healing — attackers who hit Adele lose 45% of their healing while her vines tick.

items.Dawnstar: first — stacks a damage cut on everyone trading into her
items.Xenia: second — recharging shields for the ally she guards
items.Tainted Guard: punishes divers with a 45% healing cut and a bleed

metaBuilds.holes: The anti-heal only triggers on people hitting Adele — it does nothing to sustain heroes who ignore her.

optimizer.synergy: Pure wall shopping: physical mitigation first so Adele can stand inside her own Thornbush, stacking Vanity armors mid-game, then regeneration and tenacity to hold late fights.

items.Stonewall: first — flat physical mitigation for the hardest-hitting lane threats
items.Warden's Faith: blunts crit carries and cuts attackers' physical power
items.Vainglory: stacking armors reward staying in extended fights
items.Raiment of Renewal: missing-health regeneration keeps her frontlining between fights
items.Catalytic Drive: execute utility plus gold, evolving later at base
items.Unbroken Will: tenacity and the armor surge close the build

swaps.gain: +50% more physical survivability in the sim
swaps.lose: Dawnstar's stacking cut to enemy damage and its burst of attack speed

optimizer.holes: Six defensive items and no damage — if her team can't convert her crowd control, Adele tanks plenty and wins nothing.
